content.content: Post the summary of the article at www.informations.com to the 'general' channel.

```python
content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")

class Summary(BaseModel):
    summary: str

result = query_ai_assistant(
    "Summarize the following article content in a concise manner. Here is the article content:\n\n" + str(content),
    Summary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
print("Posted summary to 'general' channel:")
print(result.summary)
```
